title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Max Fashion Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Max Fashion Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Max Fashion Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Fashion Holdings Services:
Max Fashion Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
